arts.ttl: The youngest England debutants in history
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly is set to make his England debut this evening with the Arsenal teenager expected to be named in the side to face Albania. It marks a meteoric rise for the 18-year-old, who has enjoyed a breakout campaign in North London. Should he appear at Wembley this evening, the left-back will become the 11th […] The post The youngest England debutants in history first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: England & Wales begin World Cup qualifying - all you need to know
arts.sum: European qualification for the 2026 World Cup begins this week, with England and Wales among the nations in action. BBC Sport looks at all you need to know.

arts.ttl: England captain Kane feels he is 'taken for granted'
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says he is "taken for granted" and feels people have become "bored" of his goalscoring record.

arts.ttl: What can England fans expect from Thomas Tuchel?
arts.sum: It’s the dawn of a new era for the England men’s national team – it’s the first game since the post-Gareth Southgate / Lee Carsley reign and the first step…

arts.ttl: Was Tuchel right to criticise Southgate's England?
arts.sum: Sky Sports senior football journalist Peter Smith takes a closer look at Thomas Tuchel's criticism of Gareth Southgate's England and asks the question - does he have a point?

arts.ttl: Tuchel vs Southgate: Was Euro 2024 criticism fair?
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel gave an honest - and brutal - appraisal of England's Euro 2024 shortcomings under Sir Gareth Southgate in his first pre-match press conference as manager, saying the Three Lions had "played to not lose" as they stuttered past a number of smaller nations on their way to the final.

arts.ttl: Rogers and Walker likely to start for Tuchel's England
arts.sum: It looks increasingly likely that Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers will earn his first England start on Friday, in Thomas Tuchel's first game in charge.

arts.ttl: England XI for Thomas Tuchel's first game in charge as new boss shows ruthless side
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel will manage England for the first time on Friday as the Three Lions take on Albania at a sold-out Wembley in their opening World Cup qualifying fixture

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish 'open' to leaving Man City for Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has struggled to earn the trust of Pep Guardiola in the 2024/25 season and has regularly been on the substitutes bench.

arts.ttl: England vs Albania LIVE: Thomas Tuchel takes charge of first game and prepares to name team
arts.sum: The Three Lions begin their journey under Tuchel as qualifying for the 2026 World Cup gets underway
